title: Evangelion in Hi Def
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion in Hi Def? Post by aboose » Sat Jul 07, 2012 3:05 am No, I don't mean Rebuild, even though I do like Rebuild. I was wondering if NGE was ever planned to be released in higher definition, a la Ghost in the Shell Blu-rays.

[]: Post by ReiAyanami25 » Sat Jul 07, 2012 4:34 am There are collector's disks that contain high-quality (seemingly enhanced) screen shots from NGE, but I myself have encountered no news of such things when it relates to DVDs. There are several different DVD releases of NGE that differ from the original aired episodes, on different DVDs, (Perfect Collection, Renewal (Japan), Platinum.) but from my experience and knowledge, Renewal has somewhat better resolution than the TV aired episodes did, as I believe Platinum possesses subtle differences. I am fairly certain that the Platinum and Renewal releases have remastered audio. But as for a higher definition version of NGE, I must say that if Gainax and Anno see that there is any money to be made from a higher quality edition, they will make it so. They can always milk the 'eternal Eva cow' as much as they see fit.... But otherwise, no. There have been no such things ever made. If they decide to make such a thing, I am buying it.

[]: Post by aboose » Sat Jul 07, 2012 4:56 am As am I, good sir. If there are any plans, I haven't been able to find any. However, I do find myself very confused as to the differences between all the different releases of this series. Although I'm guessing that's a whole other beast altogether.

[]: Post by CJD » Sat Jul 07, 2012 7:30 am I'm legitimately surprised they haven't announced an HD rerelease of Eva yet. The term "Blu Rei" is just asking for it.

[]: Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Sat Jul 07, 2012 9:09 am A Blu Rei release of Evangelion now that I would spend all my money on. Though I would prefer for it to have all the special features that the DVD box set released in Japan had in 2003. So come on Funi get those rights and re-release it

[]: Post by Ornette » Sat Jul 07, 2012 9:53 am Take a look at these: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/9579/Eva-on-Blu-Ray/ http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/10206/Blu-Ray-Re-Release/ http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/8879/Any-Eva-releases-in-widescreen/ Mostly, there's 16mm masters right now for the TV series. There was a re-master (shot from cells) for Platinum but there was some amount of damage to some of them afterwards so can't re-master to 35mm. Or something like that.

[]: Post by tomrule123 » Sat Jul 07, 2012 11:12 am I care more about The End of Evangelion to be presented on Blu-ray than the TV series and Death/Rebirth. End of EVA deserves the royal High-Def treatment it should deserve. SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Jul 08, 2012 9:49 am Ornette wrote: Take a look at these: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/9579/Eva-on-Blu-Ray/ http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/10206/Blu-Ray-Re-Release/ http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/8879/Any-Eva-releases-in-widescreen/ Mostly, there's 16mm masters right now for the TV series. There was a re-master (shot from cells) for Platinum but there was some amount of damage to some of them afterwards so can't re-master to 35mm. Or something like that.
